THE DENIAL OF THE MOTION TO VACATE IS SUBJECT TO THE CONDITION PRECEDENT THAT PLAINTIFFS FIRST RETURN TO DEFENDANTS ALL VOUCHERS, COUPONS OR AUTHORIZATIONS FOR ALL TOUR, HOTEL, AIR OR GROUND COMPONENTS FOR THE TOUR PLAINTIFFS CANCELLED.
